name: Maxtor Midline Storage Interactive Demo (Adobe Flash)
description: An interactive Adobe Flash (Macromedia Flash 6) demonstration tool created by Aberdeen Group for Maxtor Corporation circa 2003 as a companion to the Mid-Line Disk Storage white paper. The SWF binary visualizes the enterprise storage hierarchy and positions Maxtor's Serial ATA midline drives between high-end Fibre Channel storage and offline tape. Designed as an innovative sales enablement and analyst-led content marketing tool for use by Maxtor's marketing team and in press/analyst interactions.
